name: CT-Guided Biopsy
description: CT-guided percutaneous biopsy procedure report template

findings.technique: CT-guided percutaneous biopsy was performed using [X gauge] needle. The patient was positioned [supine/prone/decubitus] and the target was localized.

sections.name: Target Lesion
sections.content: The target lesion is located in the [location] and measures approximately [X] cm in greatest dimension.

sections.name: Approach
sections.content: The biopsy needle was advanced via a [posterior/lateral/anterior] approach through the [organ/tissue] into the target lesion under CT guidance.

sections.name: Procedure
sections.content: [X] passes were obtained through the lesion. Specimens were obtained for [cytology / pathology / microbiology].

sections.name: Complications
sections.content: No immediate complication. No pneumothorax / no hemorrhage / no pain reported.

sections.name: Post-Procedure
sections.content: Post-procedure scan demonstrates [no complication / no pneumothorax / no active bleeding]. The patient tolerated the procedure well.

impression:
CT-guided percutaneous biopsy of [location] was performed without complication.
Specimens submitted for pathological analysis.
